---
title: "NanoQuRe Sequencing QC Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
params:
  data: NULL
---


```{r}
# nie wywala errorow
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
echo = FALSE,
message = FALSE,
warning = FALSE,
autodep = TRUE,
cache = TRUE,
cache.lazy = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```




```{r, echo=FALSE}


```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot(plot_read_lengths())
```


```{r}

```
